title: E-commerce white-background product retouch suite + vectorized brand mark
one_line_ask: Turn a client's raw, messy-background product photo into a pure-white-background marketplace catalog image and convert their rough hand-drawn logo sketch into a clean, brand-colored, scalable vector logo — then package everything for delivery.

issues: Slight shadow in lower left corner (acceptable per brief)
Faint pencil guide lines and uneven lighting (acceptable per brief)
Minor paper texture and off-white color (acceptable per brief)
Slight tilt and visible hand-drawn imperfections (acceptable per brief)
Slight shadow in bottom-left corner partially clips the frame but does not obscure the subject
Circle element on the right side of the botanical emblem is slightly incomplete/open, though this reads as intentional hand-drawn imperfection
Faint pencil guide lines visible (cross-hair registration marks) — acceptable per brief as deliberate source artifact
Blank label contains no text — minor point as brief does not explicitly require label text, just the bottle type
Slight luminance noise visible but within acceptable range for smartphone simulation
Table edge diagonal tilt is present but closer to 2–3 degrees rather than the specified ~4 degrees — still acceptable
Power cord in background is white/light-coloured, slightly less visually 'messy' than a darker cord might be, but still qualifies as a distraction element
No severe specular blowout on the curved amber glass — reflections are present but relatively controlled; brief calls for blown-out hot spots which are only mildly present
